---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: 'eimi-codes'
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

---

## 🎯 Is this related to a problem?

Describe the problem this feature would solve.

---

## 💻 Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Describe your ideal implementation.

---

## 📚 Alternative Approaches

Have you considered alternative solutions or features?

---

## 🤔 Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or examples?

---

## ♿ Accessibility Considerations

How does this feature impact accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA compliance)?

- [ ] Improves accessibility
- [ ] No impact on accessibility
- [ ] Need to evaluate accessibility impact
